name: Smoked Sausage Antipasto Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the smoked sausage in a skillet over medium heat until thoroughly cooked.
2. Remove the sausage from the skillet and drain well on paper towels.
3. Arrange lettuce on a large serving dish.
4. Top with vegetables (tomatoes, cucumber, carrot, cauliflower) and sausage slices.
5. Sprinkle crumbled Feta cheese over the salad.
6. Pour the Italian salad dressing evenly over the salad.
7. Mix gently to ensure all ingredients are well coated with the dressing.
8. Serve immediately. Total preparation and cooking time: 15-20 minutes.
